final:
module interrupt_controller(
    input wire [2:0] no_irq,
    output reg ack
);
    always @(no_irq) begin
        if (no_irq != 3'b000) begin
            ack = 1'b1; // Set ack high if any no_irq is high
        end else begin
            ack = 1'b0; // Reset ack if all no_irq are low
        end
    end
endmodule
